marketName: Battery Energy Storage Systems (Other Electric Power Generation)

alternatives.name: Solar-EPC extension into BESS (Mein Solar, BayWa r.e., Enerparc, Goldbeck)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Grid-code & civil depth; thin BESS reference count vs. OEM giants

alternatives.name: OEM-led turnkey (Fluence, Tesla Megapack, Sungrow, Wärtsilä)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Deep cell/PCS integration; vendor lock-in; weaker local civil + permit; less PV-hybrid flexibility

alternatives.name: Pure-play BESS EPC integrator (Kyon, GreenTech, SolarEast EPC)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Storage-first pedigree, OEM-agnostic; smaller balance sheet; no PV-hybrid history

alternatives.name: Split-contract / owner-managed multi-prime (DNV/Fichtner PMC + separate lots)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Lowest price ceiling; owner owns interface & schedule risk

alternatives.name: Defer or cancel project
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero CAPEX, zero burden; forgoes revenue window, grid-queue slot (226 GW DE backlog)
